exploration_notes: The existing PipelineOptionsValidator.java (140 lines) has static methods `validate()` and `validateCli()` that check `@Validation.Required` annotations on PipelineOptions getter methods. Validation is also scattered in PipelineOptionsFactory.java which has private `validateClass()`, `validateReturnType()`, `validateMethodAnnotations()`, `validateGettersSetters()`, and `validateWellFormed()` methods (lines 964-1026, 1034-1039, 1065-1121, 1218-1248, 2103-2184). The validator is called from Pipeli
